import React from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import './LandingPage.css'; const LandingPage = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const handleExploreThemes = () => { navigate('/k-tabletop'); }; return (

Welcome to Jeena's Kitchen

Experience the authentic flavors of Korean cuisine through our interactive tabletop experience. Discover traditional recipes, explore themed dining environments, and immerse yourself in the rich culinary culture of Korea.

Interactive Themes

Explore different Korean dining environments from traditional homes to modern cafes.

Authentic Recipes

Learn traditional Korean recipes with step-by-step instructions and cultural context.

Immersive Experience

Enjoy ambient sounds and visual themes that transport you to Korea.

); }; export default LandingPage;
